transcript: Speaker A: ಏನು ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ ಗುರು? [What are you doing, guru?] Speaker B: I steel cutting boss. Speaker A: ಹಹಹ! "ಸ್ಟೀಲ್ ಕಟ್ಟಿಂಗ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀನಿ" ಅಲ್ಲ, "I am cutting steel" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Hahaha! Not "steel cutting", you should say "I am cutting steel".] Speaker B: ಅಯ್ಯೋ... English ತುಂಬಾ difficult ಅನ್ಸುತ್ತೆ. [Oh... English seems very difficult.] Speaker A: Difficult ಅಲ್ಲ ಗುರು... practice ಇಲ್ಲ ಅಷ್ಟೇ. [Not difficult, guru... just lack of practice.] Speaker B: ಆದರೆ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡಿ ಮನೆಗೆ ಹೋಗೋ ಅಷ್ಟರಲ್ಲಿ energy ಇರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But by the time I finish work and go home, there's no energy left.] Speaker A: ಅದಕ್ಕೆ MySivi ಇದೆ. ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 ನಿಮಿಷ practice ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ ಸಾಕು. [That's why MySivi is here. Just 15 minutes of practice a day is enough.] Speaker B: Fees ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಇರುತ್ತಾ? [Will the fees be high?] Speaker A: ಇಲ್ಲ ಗುರು... ಕೇವಲ 1 rupee ಇಂದ ಸ್ಟಾರ್ಟ್ ಮಾಡಬಹುದು. ಈಗಾಗಲೇ 1 ಕೋಟಿ ಜನ MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ English ಕಲಿತಿದ್ದಾರೆ. [No guru... you can start from just 1 rupee. Already 1 crore people are learning English on MySivi.] Speaker B: ಅಂದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಕೂಡ fluent ಆಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದಾ? [So can I also speak fluently?] Speaker A: ಖಂಡಿತ! Next time "I am cutting steel" ಅಂತ full confidence ನಲ್ಲಿ ಹೇಳ್ತೀರಾ. [Definitely! Next time you will say "I am cutting steel" with full confidence.] Speaker B: Super guru... ಹೇಗೆ join ಆಗೋದು? [Super guru... how to join?] Speaker A: ಕೆಳಗಿರುವ install ಬಟನ್ ಒತ್ತಿ, MySivi app install ಮಾಡಿ, ನಿಮ್ಮ English journey ಇವತ್ತೇ start ಮಾಡಿ. [Press the install button below, install the MySivi app, and start your English journey today.] Speaker C: Click on install now and download MySivi app.
on_screen_text: ಏನ್ ಮಾಡ್ತಿದ್ದೀರಾ [What are you doing] BOSS ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ [doing] "I AM CUTTING STEEL" ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ಬೇಕು. [Should say "I AM CUTTING STEEL".] ಅಯ್ಯೋ... ENGLISH ತುಂಬಾ DIFFICULT [Oh... ENGLISH is very DIFFICULT] DIFFICULT ಅಲ್ಲ ಗುರು... PRACTICE ಇಲ್ಲ, ಅಷ್ಟೇ [Not DIFFICULT guru... no PRACTICE, that's all] ಆದರೆ ಕೆಲಸ ಮಾಡಿ ENERGY ಇರೋದಿಲ್ಲ. [But working, no ENERGY.] ಅದಕ್ಕೆ [For that] MySivi ದಿನಕ್ಕೆ ಕೇವಲ 15 MIN PRACTICE ಮಾಡಿದ್ರೆ [If you PRACTICE just 15 MIN a day] FEES ಜಾಸ್ತಿ ಇರುತ್ತಾ? [Will FEES be high?] ಇಲ್ಲ ಗುರು... ಕೇವಲ 1 RUPEE [No guru... just 1 RUPEE] 1 CRORES+ PEOPLE MySivi ನಲ್ಲಿ [1 CRORES+ PEOPLE in MySivi] ಅಂದ್ರೆ ನಾನು ಕೂಡ FLUENT ಆಗಿ ಮಾತಾಡಬಹುದಾ? [So can I also speak FLUENTLY?] ಖಂಡಿತ! [Definitely!] NEXT TIME "I AM CUTTING STEEL" ಅಂತ FULL CONFIDENCE [NEXT TIME "I AM CUTTING STEEL" with FULL CONFIDENCE] SUPER GURU... ಹೇಗೆ [SUPER GURU... how] ಕೆಳಗಿರುವ INSTALL [INSTALL below] APP INSTALL ಮಾಡಿ... [INSTALL APP...] ನಿಮ್ಮ ENGLISH [Your ENGLISH] JOURNEY ಇವತ್ತೇ START ಮಾಡಿ. [START JOURNEY today.] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI robot corrects a welder's English in a split-screen setup. The robot promotes MySivi as an easy, affordable way to practice English for 15 minutes a day starting at 1 Rupee. The ad concludes with a call to install the app.
